scripts.render: npm run fetch && npm run render:models && npm run render:providers && npm run render:tokens
scripts.render:models: remotion render models out/stat-models.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=2 --props=out/props-models.json && node scripts/wrap-svg.mjs out/stat-models.gif ../profile/assets/stat-models.svg
scripts.render:providers: remotion render providers out/stat-providers.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=2 --props=out/props-providers.json && node scripts/wrap-svg.mjs out/stat-providers.gif ../profile/assets/stat-providers.svg
scripts.render:tokens: remotion render tokens out/stat-tokens.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=2 --props=out/props-tokens.json && node scripts/wrap-svg.mjs out/stat-tokens.gif ../profile/assets/stat-tokens.svg
